memoryArtifacts.headline: Find-A-Grave Memorial for Phillippa Frost 1512-1558
memoryArtifacts.description:
Phillippa was born about 1510, maybe a little later, most likely in the area of Glemsford, Suffolk, England. The incidents of her birth and parentage are not known. Around 1530, she married William Frost in St. Mary the Virgin Church in Glemsford. She was surely his second wife and he was a widower, with probably at least two children. See his memorial for the reason for this statement. Phillippa and William had several children, all born in Glemsford. William was a yeoman, or farmer, but he had large land holdings and was very prosperous. William died in Glemsford in 1549. Later, Phillippa married John Webb of nearby Lidgate, Suffolk and had a daughter with him, baptised in Lidgate on July 17, 1553. That further cements the supposition that William had two wives. If Phillippa was his only wife, then she had a child in about 1520, and another in 1553, not impossible, but highly unlikely. Phillippa died in Lidgate in January, 1558 and was buried in the churchyard of St. Mary’s Church on the 20th. John Webb died in July, 1558.
https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/92163133/phillippa-frost

memoryArtifacts.headline: Phillipa
memoryArtifacts.description: William died in the summer of 1549, testate. After his death, his widow remarried on 15 September 1552 at Glemsford, John Webb of Lidgate, which is about eight miles from Glemsford. He was a widower, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Scott於1497年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，她的父親Thomas Scott20歲，母親Mary Ann Bishop16歲。她於1520年與William Frost II在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年1月20日在英國英格蘭素福爾可利其亞特享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可利其亞特。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Scott was born in 1497, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Scott, was 20 and her mother, Mary Ann Bishop, was 16. She married William Frost II in 1520, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 January 1558, in Lidgate, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Lidgate, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Scott est née en 1497, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Scott, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Ann Bishop, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé William Frost II en 1520, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 janvier 1558, à Lidgate, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Lidgate, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Scott 1497 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Scott 20 und ihre Mutter Mary Ann Bishop 16. Sie hat 1520 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom William Frost II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Januar 1558 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Lidgate, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lidgate, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Scott è nata il nel 1497 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Scott, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mary Ann Bishop, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato William Frost II nel 1520, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1558, nel Lidgate, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Lidgate, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Scott(이)가 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Scott(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Ann Bishop(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 William Frost II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리드가트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Scott nasceu em 1497, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Scott, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ann Bishop, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com William Frost II em 1520, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1558, em Lidgate, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Lidgate, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Scott родилась в 1497 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Scott было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ann Bishop, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Frost II в 1520 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 января 1558 г. в местности лиджэит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности лиджэит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Scott nació en 1497, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Scott, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mary Ann Bishop, tenía 16 años. Se casó con William Frost II en 1520, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de enero de 1558, en Lidgate, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Lidgate, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
